overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a fantasy wizarding school video game, showing robed students gathered in a covered timber pavilion with heavy wooden beams and stone flooring, sunlight streaming in from the open sides overlooking a grassy courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered timber pavilion with dining tables

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint observing the gathering of students in the pavilion

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes with yellow collar standing near the foreground table
group of students conversing near the back table by the courtyard entrance

entered.detail: massive wooden support beams and arched ceiling structure
long wooden tables with benches where students are gathered
grey stone tile flooring throughout the pavilion
tall dark wooden cabinets against the right wall
sunlit green lawn visible through the open archway
medieval-style lanterns suspended from the ceiling beams
green plants in pots along the left side

segments.scene_description: A static view of a medieval-style covered pavilion with heavy timber architecture. Robed students gather around wooden tables on stone flooring, while sunlight streams in from the open sides revealing a grassy courtyard beyond. The scene remains calm with students standing and conversing in small groups.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, cinematic view of a medieval-style covered pavilion where students gather in a serene academic atmosphere. It begins with a wide perspective of the heavy timber architecture and stone flooring, capturing robed students conversing in small groups around wooden tables. As the camera lingers, the focus emphasizes the contrast between the shaded interior and the bright, natural light streaming in from the open sides. The scene finally settles on the peaceful interaction of the students against the backdrop of a lush, grassy courtyard visible beyond the pavilion's beams.
